صلى الله عليه وسلم.notes: Use ﷺ symbol inline after Prophet's name

السترة.notes: Barrier in front of praying person

عن.notes: Transmission term: on the authority of

المنقطع.notes: Hadith with a break in the chain

المعضل.notes: Hadith with two consecutive missing links

الجزية.notes: Tax on non-Muslims in Islamic state

غزوة.notes: Military expedition led by the Prophet

سرية.notes: Military expedition not led by the Prophet

ليلة القدر.notes: Night in last ten days of Ramadan

alt_spellings: the one who distinguishes truth from falsehood

أمين.notes: Title of the Prophet before prophethood
